description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a rabbit, featuring long floppy ears, a rounded head, and a soft, cuddly body. The toy is made from a light beige or tan fabric with a slightly textured, fuzzy surface, and its limbs are proportionally short and rounded. The face is simple, with small, round black eyes and a subtle stitched nose and mouth, giving it a gentle and approachable expression. The inner sides of the ears and the bottoms of the feet are made from a lighter, almost white fabric, adding contrast to the overall appearance. The toy is seated on a white, slightly crumpled cloth, which serves as a base but is not part of the toy itself. The overall look is inviting and comforting, suitable for children or as a decorative item in an urban environment.
description: A soft, beige plush rabbit with long floppy ears, round black eyes, and light-colored feet, seated on a white cloth. Its gentle expression and cuddly form make it appealing and comforting.
description_view_0: The back of the plush rabbit is visible, showing its floppy ears draped down and the rounded back and tail.
description_view_1: A side view of the rabbit, highlighting the profile of its head, one visible eye, and the positioning of its limbs.
description_view_2: The front of the rabbit is shown, with both eyes, the stitched nose and mouth, and the light-colored feet clearly visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, displaying the other profile of the head, ear, and limbs, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small round black eyes and a simple stitched mouth and nose, giving it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both legs extended forward and arms resting at its sides, head facing forward.
